ogTitle: Mulga Downs vs Mullaloo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulga Downs and Mullaloo.
heading: Mulga Downs vs Mullaloo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulga Downs, Western Australia and Mullaloo, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulga Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Mullaloo (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulga Downs or Mullaloo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulga Downs has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mullaloo scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulga Downs scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mullaloo scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulga Downs or Mullaloo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulga Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
